title: Pakistan extends airspace ban for Indian aircraft till August 24
description: Karachi's airspace closure for Indian aircraft continues until August 24. This restriction applies to all Indian-registered and operated flights. Pakistan's airports authority issued a notice detailing the extended ban. India maintains a reciprocal ban on Pakistani aircraft following last year's terror attack. Both nations closed their airspace amid heightened bilateral tensions.
